## Idea

Given an arbitrary [subset](universal-algebra.subsets-algebras.md) `S` of an
[algebra](universal-algebra.algebras.md) `A`, there is a minimal
[subalgebra](universal-algebra.subalgebras.md) `A` containing `S`.

## Definition

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 l4 : Level}
  (σ : signature l1)
  (T : Algebraic-Theory l2 σ)
  (A : Algebra l3 σ T)
  (S : subset-Algebra l4 σ T A)
  where

  subalgebra-generated-subset-Algebra : Subalgebra (l1 ⊔ l3 ⊔ l4) σ T A
  subalgebra-generated-subset-Algebra =
    submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature σ (model-Algebra σ T A) S

  subset-generated-subset-Algebra : subset-Algebra (l1 ⊔ l3 ⊔ l4) σ T A
  subset-generated-subset-Algebra =
    subset-Subalgebra σ T A subalgebra-generated-subset-Algebra

  leq-generated-subset-Algebra : S ⊆ subset-generated-subset-Algebra
  leq-generated-subset-Algebra =
    leq-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature σ (model-Algebra σ T A) S

  algebra-generated-subset-Algebra : Algebra (l1 ⊔ l3 ⊔ l4) σ T
  algebra-generated-subset-Algebra =
    algebra-Subalgebra σ T A subalgebra-generated-subset-Algebra
```

## Properties

### The algebra generated by `S ⊆ A` is the least subalgebra containing `S`

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 l4 l5 : Level}
  (σ : signature l1)
  (T : Algebraic-Theory l2 σ)
  (A : Algebra l3 σ T)
  (S : subset-Algebra l4 σ T A)
  (B : Subalgebra l5 σ T A)
  where

  abstract
    is-lower-bound-subalgebra-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      S ⊆ subset-Subalgebra σ T A B →
      leq-Subalgebra σ T A (subalgebra-generated-subset-Algebra σ T A S) B
    is-lower-bound-subalgebra-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature =
      is-lower-bound-submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature
        ( σ)
        ( model-Algebra σ T A)
        ( S)
        ( B)
```
